global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and circular icons.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install PixelForge with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and energetic feel.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Three circular icons arranged horizontally in the center, each with a simple outline and a light color.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A single circular icon below the previous three, featuring a similar outline style.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'PixelForge 38 Beat your rivals' in a contrasting color, prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: PixelForge 38 Beat your rivals No ads in first week

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom with the text 'Install now', designed to stand out against the background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, PixelForge, install now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered at the top, icons are in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: PixelForge 38, Beat your rivals, No ads in first week, Install now
